data.body: Intent-contradicting (working as designed): Closed ticket 6cd2-ff7a and commit 35f58c70 (2026-03-31) deliberately added guidance to agent-clarity.md: 'Do NOT require all SC to be verifiable within the closing session.' value.md explicitly lists dogfooding observations as preferred validation_signal. The behavior ebe0-7431 reports as a bug was intentionally introduced to resolve a prior bug (6cd2-ff7a) with the opposite failure mode.
